description_long: This is an ornate golden cup with a wide, shallow bowl and two elaborately curved handles extending from either side. The surface has a textured, metallic finish that gives it a slightly rough, glittering appearance. The cup sits atop a rounded, pedestal-style base that narrows at the stem and flares out at the bottom, providing stability. The handles are decorative, featuring elegant scrollwork that adds a regal and ceremonial feel. The interior appears to be smooth and continuous with the exterior, suitable for holding liquids or small objects. Its overall design suggests it could be used as a trophy, ceremonial goblet, or decorative urban feature.
description: A golden, textured cup with ornate curved handles and a pedestal base, exuding a ceremonial and decorative appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing both ornate handles and the wide, open bowl with the pedestal base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of one handle and the depth of the bowl, with the base seen from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying both handles and the bowl, but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the other handle and the bowl's depth.
